services.name: Brick Work & Paving
services.desc: Brick laying for all jobs big or small — new builds, renovations, extensions, fireplaces, patios and retaining walls. Solid, lasting work.

services.name: Plastering & Crack Repairs
services.desc: Indoor and outdoor plastering for whole homes or single walls. We find the root cause of cracks, repair properly, and leave a clean finish.

services.name: Screeding & Wooden Floors
services.desc: Floor screeding to level and prepare surfaces. Wooden floor sanding and re-sealing to bring tired floors back to their original quality.

services.name: Plumbing
services.desc: Reliable plumbing repairs and installations for bathrooms, kitchens and swimming pools. Leaks, blockages, full installations — available 24 hours.

services.name: Tiling & Cladding
services.desc: Wall and floor tiling for bathrooms, kitchens, outdoor areas and feature walls. We also install cladding and stone veneers.

services.name: Painting & Waterproofing
services.desc: Exterior and interior painting, roof painting, damp proofing and waterproofing. We repair leaking roofs, patios, bathrooms and showers.

services.name: Skimming & Ceilings
services.desc: Smooth skim plaster applied to walls and ceilings for a paint-ready surface. Ceiling installations, repairs and board replacements.

services.name: Drywalling & Partitioning
services.desc: Drywall for internal walls, partitions, design features, arches and eaves. Quick, clean and cost-effective space division.

services.name: Electrical Services
services.desc: General electrical work including lighting, downlights, DB boards, appliance installations and swimming pool pumps.

services.name: Built-in Cupboards
services.desc: Custom built-in cupboards and storage solutions for bedrooms, kitchens and living areas. Designed to fit your space.

services.name: Bathroom & Kitchen Renovations
services.desc: Complete remodels from gut to finished — waterproof, tile, plumb and paint. We handle the whole job so you don't have to manage five contractors.

services.name: Construction & Extensions
services.desc: New rooms, garages, house extensions and full construction projects across Cape Town. Built properly, from the ground up.
